panels.title: Ledger Age
panels.description: Seconds since last ledger close for both implementations. Should track closely when both are in sync.

panels.title: Ledger Close Duration (avg)
panels.description: Average ledger close duration. Henyey uses a histogram, core uses a summary — both compared via rate(sum)/rate(count).

panels.title: Ledger Close Duration (p99)
panels.description: 99th percentile close duration. Henyey: histogram_quantile, Core: summary quantile.

panels.title: Transaction Count
panels.description: Transactions per ledger. Henyey: gauge per-close. Core: summary average.

panels.title: Apply Time (per ledger)
panels.description: Total transaction apply time per ledger close. Henyey: stellar_ledger_apply_us gauge. Core: sum of per-tx apply seconds divided by ledger count (= total apply per ledger).

panels.title: Quorum Agree / Disagree
panels.description: Number of nodes agreeing/disagreeing with the latest externalized slot.

panels.title: Quorum Fail At / Missing
panels.description: Fail-at: how many nodes can fail before quorum loss. Missing: nodes not participating.

panels.title: SCP Externalize Time
panels.description: Time to externalize a slot. Henyey: gauge (last slot). Core: summary rate(sum)/rate(count).

panels.title: SCP First-to-Self Externalize Lag
panels.description: Time from first observed EXTERNALIZE (any node) to self-externalize. Apples-to-apples between henyey and stellar-core (both measure propagation-lag, ~0.3-0.5s healthy). See #1975 — the 'SCP Externalize Time' panel above compares different metrics (henyey slot-cycle vs core propagation-lag) and overstates the henyey-vs-core gap.

panels.title: SCP Nominate Time
panels.description: Time to nominate a value. Henyey: gauge (last slot). Core: summary rate(sum)/rate(count).

panels.title: SCP Envelope Rates
panels.description: SCP envelope emit/sign and receive rates. Henyey: emit_total/receive_total. Core: envelope_sign/envelope_receive.

panels.title: Authenticated Peers (Inbound / Outbound)
panels.description: Authenticated peer connections. Solid lines = inbound, dashed = outbound.

panels.title: Message Read / Write Rate
panels.description: Overlay message rates (henyey only — core uses different metric structure for overlay messages).

panels.title: Bucket Merge Time
panels.description: Time spent in bucket merges. Henyey: counter in us. Core: summary in seconds.

panels.title: Close Phase Breakdown (avg per close)
panels.description: Stacked average time per close phase. Henyey-only — no core equivalent.
